title: paraprasophyllum dossenum
side_effects: Paraprasophyllum dossenum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its toxic alkaloids. Prolonged consumption may lead to cardiovascular problems, including elevated heart rate and blood pressure. The plant's high toxicity can also result in skin irritation, including rashes and redness, in individuals who come into contact with it. In severe cases, improper use of Paraprasophyllum dossenum can even cause respiratory failure due to its potent neurotoxic compounds.
